channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: Crumbl: Free Cookie Thin — No Purchase Needed (July 20 Only)
item.guid: Crumbl-Free Cookie Thin — No Purchase Needed (J-2026-07-20
item.description: Walk into any Crumbl store today and claim one free Cookie Thin (Pink Sugar, Chocolate Chip, S'mores, or Brownie Batter) — no app or rewards required. (July 20, 2026)

item.title: Moe's Southwest Grill: $9.95 Value Meal — Burrito + Chips & Queso + Drink
item.guid: Moe's Southwest Grill-$9.95 Value Meal — Burrito + Chips &-2026-07-20
item.description: Get a full burrito, chips and queso, and a drink for just $9.95 — one of the best everyday values at a fast-casual Mexican bowl chain. (Ongoing)

item.title: Domino's: Any Pizza, Any Crust, Any Toppings for $9.99
item.guid: Domino's-Any Pizza, Any Crust, Any Toppings for $-2026-07-20
item.description: Order any Domino's pizza — including Parmesan Stuffed Crust — with any toppings for just $9.99 online or in-app through July 26. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Shake Shack: Any Custard for $3 — Code CUSTARDTIME
item.guid: Shake Shack-Any Custard for $3 — Code CUSTARDTIME-2026-07-20
item.description: Use code CUSTARDTIME in-app, online, or at a kiosk to get any frozen custard for just $3 at participating Shake Shack locations. (Through August 19, 2026)

item.title: Popeyes: $5 Faves Menu — 3 Pieces of Chicken or Tenders + 2 Sides
item.guid: Popeyes-$5 Faves Menu — 3 Pieces of Chicken or T-2026-07-20
item.description: Get three pieces of fried chicken or tenders with two individual sides for just $5 at participating Popeyes nationwide. (Through August 31, 2026)

item.title: Wingstop: $16.99 Boneless Meal Box — 20 Wings + Large Fry + 2 Dips
item.guid: Wingstop-$16.99 Boneless Meal Box — 20 Wings + La-2026-07-20
item.description: Score 20 boneless wings, a large fry, and two dips for $16.99 — Wingstop's revived soccer-season value bundle. (Limited time)

item.title: Taco Bell: $5.99 Luxe Cravings Box — App Everyday Deal
item.guid: Taco Bell-$5.99 Luxe Cravings Box — App Everyday D-2026-07-20
item.description: The Luxe Cravings Box packs a Chalupa Supreme, Beefy 5-Layer Burrito, Double Stacked Taco, chips & nacho cheese, and a medium drink for $5.99 via app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Del Taco: $6.99 Digital Fresh Deal Bundle
item.guid: Del Taco-$6.99 Digital Fresh Deal Bundle-2026-07-20
item.description: App-exclusive bundle includes a value bean & cheese burrito, grilled chicken snacker, chicken cheddar roller, crispy chicken taco, and a 16-oz drink for $6.99. (Ongoing)

item.title: McDonald's: $5 Meal Deal — McDouble or McChicken + 4-pc Nuggets + Fries + Drink
item.guid: McDonald's-$5 Meal Deal — McDouble or McChicken + 4-2026-07-20
item.description: The everyday $5 Meal Deal in the McDonald's app includes your choice of McDouble or McChicken, 4-pc nuggets, small fries, and a small drink. (Ongoing)

item.title: Burger King: $5 Your Way Meal — Daily App Deal
item.guid: Burger King-$5 Your Way Meal — Daily App Deal-2026-07-20
item.description: Order any Your Way Meal from the BK app daily for $5 — choose your sandwich, fries, nuggets, and drink combination. (Ongoing)

item.title: Wendy's: Biggie Deals — $4, $6, and $8 Bundles in App
item.description: Wendy's Biggie Deals offer tiered value bundles at $4, $6, and $8 with sandwiches, nuggets, fries, and a drink via the app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Arby's: $1.99 Sliders — Any Slider LTO
item.description: Get any Arby's Slider for just $1.99 each at participating locations for a limited time — no app required. (Limited time)

item.title: IHOP: $6 Value Menu — Everyday Diner Deals
item.guid: IHOP-$6 Value Menu — Everyday Diner Deals-2026-07-20
item.description: IHOP's $6 Value Menu offers breakfast and diner staples at just $6 each, available all day at participating locations — great for late-night diners. (Ongoing)

item.title: Subway: $5.99 Footlong — Code FL599 in App
item.guid: Subway-$5.99 Footlong — Code FL599 in App-2026-07-20
item.description: Use code FL599 in the Subway app to get a footlong sub for $5.99 — availability varies by zip code but active at many locations nationwide. (Limited time)

item.title: Pizza Hut: Throwback Value Menu — $10 Medium 1-Topping Stuffed Crust
item.description: Pizza Hut's Throwback Value Menu brings back a medium 1-topping Stuffed Crust pizza for just $10 plus other classic value items. (Ongoing)
